Markus Sorola

Personal summary

I am a reliable and proactive contributor with versatile experience in both practical logistics and technical problem solving. As an early-morning delivery worker, I have learned to value precision and optimize processes, and I have excellent visual-spatial memory. In my free time I design, code, and maintain extensive web infrastructures and servers. I am looking for work where I can use my ability to understand large systems and quickly learn new ones — whether it is source code or complex route maps.

Education

Vocational qualification in cleaning and property services
Ammattiopisto Spesia, Turku | Apr 2019 - Apr 2021
I studied the home services specialization, which focused mainly on household care.

Ammattiopisto Spesia, Turku | Aug 2018 - Apr 2019
The program focused on independent living skills.

Varsinais-Suomen Tietojakelu Oy, Salo | Jun 2023 - Present

Valmet Automotive, Salo | Oct 2021 - Apr 2022

Ihme ja Kumma Tuki Ry, Salo | May 2021 - Oct 2021
I worked there as a flea market sales assistant for a few months until I got a job at Valmet. Later, Ihme ja Kumma unfortunately went bankrupt.
